# Agent Platform Documentation

> Agent Platform is the enterprise control plane for agentic AI — built on ABL (Agent Blueprint Language), a schema-driven language purpose-built for multi-agent orchestration where deterministic governance meets autonomous reasoning.

## Getting Started

- [Quickstart](getting-started/quickstart): Build your first AI agent in under 5 minutes — create a project, write an ABL definition, and test it in Studio.
- [Platform Overview](getting-started/platform-overview-user): What Agent Platform is, key advantages, platform components (Studio, Runtime, SearchAI), architecture, and deployment options.
- [Core Concepts](getting-started/core-concepts): Mental model, agents (with optional structured flows), supervisors, agent lifecycle, sessions, conversations, and execution flow.

## Tutorials

- [Build Your First Agent](tutorials/build-your-first-agent): Step-by-step tutorial creating an agent and adding tools (HTTP, code, MCP).
- [Add Structured Steps to an Agent](tutorials/build-a-scripted-flow): Tutorial adding a FLOW section to an agent with GATHER and step transitions.
- [Multi-Agent & Knowledge](tutorials/multi-agent-and-knowledge): Tutorial building a supervisor with handoff/delegation and connecting a knowledge base.
- [Safety, Testing & Publishing](tutorials/safety-testing-publishing): Tutorial setting up guardrails, running evaluations, and publishing to production.

## Guides

- [Building Agents](guides/building-reasoning-agents): Create agents, define identity/persona, and build multi-language agents.
- [Adding Structured Steps to Agents](guides/building-scripted-flows): Add structured flows to agents, control reasoning per step, NLU intent classification.
- [Data Collection with GATHER](guides/data-collection-with-gather): Use GATHER for data collection, field validation, LLM inference, corrections and re-prompts.
- [Tools & Integrations](guides/tools-and-integrations): HTTP tools, code tools, MCP servers, OAuth, reusable tool files, error handling, confirmation prompts, async webhooks.
- [Multi-Agent Orchestration](guides/multi-agent-orchestration): Build supervisors, implement handoff, delegation, fan-out, context passing, and routing rules.
- [Agent Collaboration & Handoff](guides/agent-collaboration-and-handoff): Handle escalation to humans and human approval workflows.
- [Knowledge Bases](guides/knowledge-bases): How knowledge bases work, create indexes, ingest documents, connect to agents, configure search, use connectors.
- [Memory & State](guides/memory-and-state): Session variables, persistent memory, auto-recall, SET/CLEAR/TRANSFORM operations.
- [Safety & Guardrails](guides/safety-and-guardrails): Input/output guardrails, business constraints, rate limiting, audit logging, custom guardrail policies.
- [Testing & Evaluation](guides/testing-and-evaluation): Test in Studio, create personas/scenarios, build LLM judge evaluators, run eval batches, interpret results, debug with traces.
- [Channels](guides/channels): Deploy on web, set up Slack/WhatsApp/voice channels, rich content, file attachments.
- [Publishing & Operations](guides/publishing-and-operations): Publish agents, set up environments, Git integration, export/import projects, monitor performance.

## Studio

- [Studio Overview](studio/studio-overview): Getting around Studio IDE, navigation, panels, project management.
- [Agent Development](studio/agent-development): Agent editor (ABL and visual), AI Architect for AI-powered agent design.
- [Tools, Knowledge & Connections](studio/tools-knowledge-connections): Tools management, knowledge base UI, connections, workflows.
- [Testing, Deployment & Operations](studio/testing-deployment-operations): Evaluations, deployment/channels, operations monitoring, alerts.
- [Insights & Settings](studio/insights-and-settings): Analytics dashboards, guardrails configuration, project settings.

## ABL Reference

- [Language Overview](abl-reference/language-overview): ABL syntax overview, file structure, comments, and conventions.
- [Agent Declaration](abl-reference/agent-declaration): AGENT keyword, GOAL, PERSONA, LIMITATIONS, EXECUTION configuration.
- [Tools](abl-reference/tools): Tool definitions, HTTP tools, code tools, MCP tools, tool parameters and return types.
- [GATHER](abl-reference/gather): GATHER construct for structured data collection, fields, validation, prompts.
- [FLOW](abl-reference/flow): FLOW construct, steps, transitions, CALL, THEN, branching, conditions.
- [Memory & Constraints](abl-reference/memory-and-constraints): MEMORY block and CONSTRAINTS block reference.
- [Guardrails](abl-reference/guardrails): GUARDRAILS block, input/output rules, severity levels, actions.
- [Multi-Agent & Supervisor](abl-reference/multi-agent-and-supervisor): SUPERVISOR, HANDOFF, DELEGATE, FAN_OUT constructs.
- [NLU](abl-reference/nlu): NLU block, intent definitions, training examples, entity extraction.
- [Lifecycle & Hooks](abl-reference/lifecycle-and-hooks): Agent lifecycle events, ON_START, ON_END, ON_ERROR hooks.
- [Rich Content & Expressions](abl-reference/rich-content-and-expressions): SAY, DISPLAY, cards, buttons, template expressions, built-in functions.
- [Data Types & Utilities](abl-reference/data-types-and-utilities): Type system, lookup tables, attachment handling.

## API Reference

- [API Overview & Authentication](api-reference/api-overview): Base URL, authentication methods (JWT, API key, SDK token), error handling, rate limits, pagination, SSE streaming.
- [Conversation API](api-reference/conversation-api): Start conversations, send messages, streaming responses, conversation history.
- [Management APIs](api-reference/management-apis): Agent, multi-agent, and tool management CRUD APIs.
- [Knowledge, Analytics & Export APIs](api-reference/knowledge-analytics-export): Knowledge base, analytics, and project export/import APIs.
- [Channels](api-reference/channels): Channel architecture, channel API, REST integration, chat/voice/email/enterprise channels.
- [SDKs](api-reference/sdks): Web SDK (JavaScript, React) and ABL SDK (server-side) reference.

## Administration

- [Workspace & Team Management](admin/workspace-and-team): Workspace setup, team roles/permissions, organization hierarchy.
- [Security & Authentication](admin/security-and-authentication): Security architecture, SSO (SAML/OIDC), MFA, integration auth, audit logging, data protection.
- [AI Model Configuration](admin/ai-model-configuration): LLM provider setup, model resolution, tiers, credentials, fallback chains, provider-specific config.
- [Workspace Configuration](admin/workspace-configuration): Secrets, environment variables, workspace guardrails, connectors.
- [Billing, Quotas & Operations](admin/billing-quotas-and-operations): Billing, platform limits, KMS/BYOK, analytics, self-hosted deployment, upgrades.

## Resources

- [Examples by Pattern](examples/by-pattern): Agent patterns with complete ABL code — customer support, RAG, data collection, multi-agent, and more.
- [Examples by Industry](examples/by-industry): Industry-specific agent examples — airlines, retail, banking, telecom, healthcare, travel.
- [Orchestration & Integration Examples](examples/orchestration-and-integration): Multi-agent orchestration patterns and tool integration recipes.
- [FAQ](faq/faq): Comprehensive FAQ covering getting started, ABL language, agent development, tools, multi-agent, deployment, security, admin, and troubleshooting.
- [Glossary](glossary/glossary): Definitions of key terms used across Agent Platform documentation.
- [Community & Support](getting-started/community): Getting help, reporting bugs, feature requests, partner program, support tiers, changelog.
